contents.readme_content:
# bsci-koi-bridge-demo

**Version**: 1.2.0
**Maintainers**: @sayertindall, @JEJodesty

## Overview
This repository contains the cadCAD simulation model for the Knowledge Organization Infrastructure (KOI) bridge. It evaluates the network topology and cryptoeconomic stability of curation markets applied to internal research entities.

## Architecture
This simulation relies on multi-scale modeling principles provided by `@danlessa` (Danilo) and stochastic optimizations drafted by `@CarolinaRiascos`.

For deep dives into the theoretical underpinnings:
1. [KOI Protocol: Bridge Research & Knowledge Organization Infrastructure](https://hackmd.io/internal-koi-bridge)
2. [Token Physics Modeling for KOI-Net Economic Incentives](https://hackmd.io/internal-cadcad-physics)

## Getting Started
Ensure you are using the latest `cadCAD` release. Run the simulation pipeline via `python model.py`. Outputs are routed automatically to the associated GDrive bucket managed by Samuel Young.
